activities_projects.title: Mineral Resource Case Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the economic importance of a major mineral resource in India
steps: Choose one mineral such as iron ore, bauxite, or copper
Research its major producing regions in India
Explain how it supports industries and economic development
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops research and analytical understanding of mineral resources
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of research and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Geological Formation Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Examine how geological processes influence mineral formation
steps: Explain mineral formation in igneous, metamorphic and sedimentary rocks
Give examples of minerals found in each formation
Analyse why some regions are richer in minerals than others
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands geological factors affecting mineral distribution

activities_projects.title: Mineral Distribution Map Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Interpret the spatial distribution of minerals in India
steps: Study a mineral distribution map of India
Identify regions rich in minerals such as Chota Nagpur plateau
Explain why these regions have high mineral concentration
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops map interpretation and geographical reasoning

activities_projects.title: Mining Impact Research Project
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate the environmental and social impacts of mining
steps: Research a mining region in India
List environmental impacts such as land degradation or water pollution
Suggest sustainable mining practices to reduce damage
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of research and practical solutions (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Energy Resource Dependency Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyse India's dependency on fossil fuels
steps: Collect data on India's use of coal, petroleum and natural gas
Explain why these resources dominate energy production
Suggest ways to reduce dependency on fossil fuels
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops critical thinking on energy sustainability
activities_projects.evaluation: Data analysis and logical reasoning (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Coalfield Location Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Examine the relationship between coalfields and industrial development
steps: Locate major coalfields such as Jharia, Raniganj and Bokaro
Identify nearby industries or power plants
Explain why industries develop near coalfields
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands link between resources and industrial growth

activities_projects.title: Renewable Energy Feasibility Study
activities_projects.objective: Assess the potential of renewable energy in India
steps: Study solar, wind and tidal energy sources
Identify regions suitable for each source in India
Explain advantages and limitations of renewable energy
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of research and analysis (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Energy Infrastructure Mapping
steps: Locate nuclear and thermal power plants in India
Mark major gas pipelines such as the HVJ pipeline
Explain their importance for national energy supply
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of mapping and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparative Energy Efficiency Study
activities_projects.objective: Compare efficiency of different energy sources
steps: Compare fossil fuels with renewable energy sources
Analyse cost, availability and environmental impact
Suggest which energy source is most sustainable for India

activities_projects.title: Energy Conservation Awareness Campaign
steps: Design a campaign encouraging energy conservation
Create posters or presentations explaining energy-saving methods
Present your campaign to classmates
